writer.name: 玛丽亚姆·塔法科里 Maryam Tafakory

director.name: 玛丽亚姆·塔法科里 Maryam Tafakory

introduction: For Maryam Tafakory, a film can have many lives and doesn’t need to be bound to a single medium or one mode of projection. A film can be fluid and take up many forms, based on its time and place of presentation. For Kassel Dokfest and the BALi Kino, Maryam Tafakory develops another iterating of her film MAST-DEL (17 Min., 2023), in which, in a performative reading, she tells us a story about forbidden bodies and desires inside and outside post-revolution Iranian cinema:Two women lie together in bed. As the wind bashes against the window, one recalls a past date to the movie theatre. The narrated scene cannot be conveyed through images. Layers of found and original footage are superimposed to fill in some of the cracks, the deletions, the limits of representation – a love song that would never pass through the censors.源自：https://www.kasselerdokfest.de/en/screenings/s-eb97712f-e126-3548-8b58-966d2c34f5b3
